findings: Docs align on no-silent-downgrade/partial requirement for full-swarm failures (README.md:35, 130; AGENTS.md:29).
README documents premium child-model overrides by default, but AGENTS.md lacks the same premium-default statement (README.md:130; AGENTS.md:17, 38).
Default model ambiguity: README specifies claude-haiku-4.5 default, while AGENTS.md says default is whatever Copilot CLI session uses (README.md:307; AGENTS.md:17, 38).
Fallback guidance only covers swarm-size failure, not premium-policy violation cases (README.md:130; AGENTS.md:29).
